skips.message: S3/minio unreachable at %s (%v); set WOWAPI_REQUIRE_S3=1 to make this a failure

skips.message: running as root ignores file permissions; cannot exercise the open-error path
skips.rationale: Root bypasses the permission invariant, so this single error-path assertion is inapplicable in that environment.
